text: I find myself enveloped by the chilly sterility of polished corridors and bold neon light. As I peer through the glass into the R+D space, I sense a purposeful excitement, the thrill of innovation and possibility brewing behind those walls. The words on the wall speak of humans and intelligent machines connecting and coexisting—this duality fills me with both hope and a hint of trepidation. I feel like an observer on the threshold between the familiar and the not-yet-imagined, just waiting to step inside and be transformed.
